allow: PowerShell($out = @{}; foreach \($c in 'node','npm','pnpm','docker','git'\) { try { $v = & $c --version 2>$null; $out[$c] = $v } catch { $out[$c] = 'NOT FOUND' } }; $out.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" }; "docker-compose: " + \(try { \(docker compose version\) } catch { 'n/a' }\))
